leadText: Combat Torque (Japanese: ファイトアクセル Fight Accel) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of the Caph Starmobile.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Combat Torque inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. Encore , Instruct , Mimic , and Sketch fail if the target's last used move was Combat Torque. Copycat fails if the last used move was Combat Torque.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V ---
